subgoals.description: Research and compile a list of potential venues in Edinburgh
subgoals.success_criterion: List of venues with name, location, contact info, and basic details

subgoals.description: Gather detailed information for the selected venue
subgoals.success_criterion: Detailed data including capacity, pricing, and amenities for one venue

subgoals.description: Write a flyer using the gathered venue details
subgoals.success_criterion: Completed flyer draft with all necessary information
